input.question: What is the failure rate per department?

payload.question: What is the failure rate per department?

output.reasoning: Compute failure rate per department by joining grades -> enrollments -> course_sections -> courses -> departments. Treat grades with numeric grade_value; consider a failure when numeric grade_value < 3.0. Include departments with no grades (rate 0). Order deterministically by failure_rate desc then department_name.
output.sql:
SELECT
  d.id AS department_id,
  d.name AS department_name,
  SUM(CASE WHEN g.grade_value ~ '^[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)?$' AND g.grade_value::numeric < 3.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failures,
  SUM(CASE WHEN g.grade_value ~ '^[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)?$' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS total_numeric_grades,
  ROUND(
    COALESCE(
      SUM(CASE WHEN g.grade_value ~ '^[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)?$' AND g.grade_value::numeric < 3.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::numeric
      / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN g.grade_value ~ '^[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)?$' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0),
    0)
  , 4) AS failure_rate
FROM public.departments d
LEFT JOIN public.courses c ON c.department_id = d.id
LEFT JOIN public.course_sections cs ON cs.course_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN public.enrollments e ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
LEFT JOIN public.grades g ON g.enrollment_id = e.id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name
ORDER BY failure_rate DESC, department_name ASC;
assumptions: Failure is defined as numeric grade_value < 3.0.
Only grades with grade_value matching a numeric pattern are counted in total; non-numeric grade_value entries are excluded from numerator and denominator.
Join path used: grades.enrollment_id -> enrollments.id -> enrollments.course_section_id -> course_sections.id -> course_sections.course_id -> courses.id -> courses.department_id -> departments.id.

payload.sql:
SELECT
  d.id AS department_id,
  d.name AS department_name,
  SUM(CASE WHEN g.grade_value ~ '^[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)?$' AND g.grade_value::numeric < 3.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS failures,
  SUM(CASE WHEN g.grade_value ~ '^[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)?$' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS total_numeric_grades,
  ROUND(
    COALESCE(
      SUM(CASE WHEN g.grade_value ~ '^[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)?$' AND g.grade_value::numeric < 3.0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::numeric
      / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN g.grade_value ~ '^[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)?$' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0),
    0)
  , 4) AS failure_rate
FROM public.departments d
LEFT JOIN public.courses c ON c.department_id = d.id
LEFT JOIN public.course_sections cs ON cs.course_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN public.enrollments e ON e.course_section_id = cs.id
LEFT JOIN public.grades g ON g.enrollment_id = e.id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name
ORDER BY failure_rate DESC, department_name ASC;
